title: Marigold Unisex El Gloves-large-1 Pair Marigold Extra Life Kitchen Gloves Large, Yellow, L (Pack of 1) (Packaging may vary)
features: Roll top cuffs that stay up
description: Product Description Protection for your hands when washing up and other household cleaning tasks. The extra life kitchen gloves have a triple-layer of natural rubber latex to last longer. They have special roll-top cuffs that stay up and a cotton lining to be extra-comfy in use. The safe-hold pattern gives you more grip and Marigold special coating stands up to the harshest household cleaners. All Marigold gloves are made to the high quality standards. Safety Warning This product contains natural latex which may cause an allergic reaction. Safe use of this product by or on a latex-sensitive individual has not been established. Manufacturer Contact Information Freudenberg Household Products, Vileda House, 2 Chichester Street, Rochdale, Lancashire, OL16 2AX. See more
